questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Web Caches?
options: Inefficient scaling of Reverse proxy servers (Nginx), HTTP cache headers validation rules (ETag, Cache-Control).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Reverse proxy servers (Nginx), HTTP cache headers validation rules (ETag, Cache-Control).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Reverse proxy servers (Nginx), HTTP cache headers validation rules (ETag, Cache-Control) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
